summary: Executed backend + frontend verification for requested 8-page architecture, wallet flows, route redirect, nav structure, and listed API endpoints. Most requested flows passed; one backend regression endpoint from existing suite failed due route conflict.

critical.issue: Returns builder-detail payload instead of leaderboard payload (missing count/data) because dynamic route /api/builders/{address} shadows static /api/builders/profiles due declaration order.

minor.issue: frontend/.env is missing REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (testing had to inject REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL at command runtime).

action_items: Fix backend route ordering so /api/builders/profiles resolves before /api/builders/{address}.
Add/align required frontend env key REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL as mandated by testing rules.
Re-run backend pytest after route fix and confirm test_foundersea_api.py::test_builder_profiles passes.
critical_code_review_comments: Route specificity bug in FastAPI: static path should be declared before dynamic path to avoid endpoint shadowing.
Environment contract drift: current app relies on BACKEND_INTERNAL_URL while test/playbook requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
Repository still contains sensitive values in backend/.env; rotate and move secrets to protected runtime secret manager.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Requested endpoints all returned 200: /api/discovery, /api/ideas/idea-104, /api/milestones/milestone-104-1, /api/builders/0xA91b...2fC4, /api/investors/portfolio, /api/chair/idea-104, /api/create/config, /api/agent/monitor, /api/contracts/status. Wallet connect/disconnect + no-wallet warning passed. Root redirect to /discover passed. All write actions remained disabled/read-only as required. Existing regression endpoint /api/builders/profiles still failing shape due route shadowing.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: GET /api/builders/profiles returns object with keys builder/tier/... instead of expected leaderboard shape count/data; pytest fails KeyError count. RCA: in backend/server.py, /api/builders/{address} is declared before /api/builders/profiles, so 'profiles' is consumed as address parameter. Mitigation: declare /api/builders/profiles before dynamic route or constrain {address} pattern. Also align env key expectations (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL vs BACKEND_INTERNAL_URL) to remove test/runtime drift.
mocked_api: MOCKED: discovery/idea/milestone/builder/portfolio/chair/create/agent payloads are seeded backend wrappers; wallet logic tested with mocked injected provider; writes intentionally disabled by product decision.
